title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Unacademy Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Unacademy Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy Global Group in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy Global Group:
Unacademy Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy Global Group!
